response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including C++ with National Instruments and low-latency systems with Dlang, which aligns well with the role's requirements. However, his leadership and mentoring experience is primarily in collaborative settings (e.g., workshops, pair programming) rather than formal technical leadership roles. His cloud infrastructure and distributed systems experience is limited, and his recent work leans heavily toward web and AI-agent tooling, which may not fully address the core cloud compute platform needs.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments, embedded systems) meeting the 8-year requirement
Proven ability to build and scale systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated leadership through mentoring, workshops, and collaborative projects
concerns: Limited cloud architecture experience; most recent work focuses on web/AI rather than distributed cloud systems
No clear evidence of managing large-scale, ambiguous technical projects end-to-end as a lead
Background lacks DevOps/CloudOps focus; more aligned with application development than infrastructure
